challenge.title: Paper pixel letter
challenge.subtitle: A 10-minute offline activity that connects art with how computers store simple images — perfect to try before your first coding class.
challenge.step1Body: On a blank sheet, draw a 5×5 grid (five rows and five columns). Use a ruler if you like — neat squares make the trick easier.
challenge.step2Body: Shade squares so the dark squares form the first letter of your first name, block-letter style. Only use the grid — no curves outside the boxes.
challenge.step3Body: For each row, write how many shaded squares are in that row (0–5), left to right. You now have five numbers — that’s a tiny “program” describing your letter.
challenge.step4Body: Show a parent or friend only your five numbers. Can they guess your letter? That’s how computers often trade compact descriptions instead of big pictures.
challenge.hintBody: Think of early video games: letters and icons were often tiny grids of on/off pixels. Font files still use similar ideas today — your grid is a handmade bitmap!

footer.description: Empowering the next generation through fun, interactive learning in technology, Arabic language, and Quran studies.

about.title: Empowering Kids to Build the Future
about.subtitle: We're a passionate team of educators, engineers, and designers dedicated to making learning fun, accessible, and meaningful for every child.
about.visionDesc: A world where every child has the opportunity to learn technology, Arabic, and Quran in an engaging, safe, and accessible environment — regardless of their background or location.
about.missionDesc: To provide the highest quality interactive education in programming, robotics, algorithms, Arabic language, and Quran studies for children ages 6–18, combining fun with real-world skills.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
about.value1Desc: Every decision is made with the child's safety, wellbeing, and growth in mind.
about.value2Desc: A secure, moderated environment that parents can trust completely.
about.value3Desc: Learning should feel like an adventure, not a chore. We make it exciting.
about.value4Desc: Quality education available to every child, everywhere, in multiple languages.
about.storyP1: ProCoder started with a simple idea: kids deserve better ways to learn the skills that matter most. As parents and educators ourselves, we saw that traditional methods weren't engaging enough for the digital generation.
about.storyP2: So we built a platform that combines the fun of gaming with the rigor of real education. Today, ProCoder serves hundreds of students across the globe, teaching them programming, robotics, Arabic, and Quran through interactive, hands-on courses.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ProCoder, we take the privacy and safety of our users — especially children — very seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.s1Content: We collect information you provide when creating an account, such as your name, email address, and your child's age and interests. We also collect usage data such as course progress and platform interactions to improve our services.
privacy.s2Content:
We use your information to:
• Provide and personalize our educational services
• Track learning progress and recommend courses
• Communicate important updates about your account
• Improve our platform and develop new features
privacy.s3Content: We are committed to protecting children's privacy. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 without verifiable parental consent. Parents can review, modify, or delete their child's information at any time.
privacy.s4Content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits. We never sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s5Content: We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and remember your preferences (like language and theme). We do not use tracking cookies for advertising purposes on our platform.
privacy.s6Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact us at privacy@procoder.com.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to ProCoder. By using our platform, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully.
terms.s1Content: By accessing or using ProCoder, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you are a parent or guardian registering on behalf of a child, you accept these terms on their behalf.
terms.s2Content: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. Parents or guardians must create and manage accounts for children under 18. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.
terms.s3Content:
You agree to use ProCoder only for lawful educational purposes. You must not:
• Share inappropriate content
• Attempt to access other users' accounts
• Use the platform to harm or bully others
• Reverse-engineer or copy our content
terms.s4Content: All course content, designs, and materials on ProCoder are protected by copyright. You may access them for personal educational use only. Redistribution, copying, or commercial use is strictly prohibited.
terms.s5Content: ProCoder provides educational content as-is. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee specific learning outcomes. We are not liable for any indirect damages arising from use of our platform.
terms.s6Content: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything parents and kids want to know before getting started
faq.ce1_q: What age group are ProCoder courses designed for?
faq.ce1_a: All our programs and courses are designed for children aged 6–18 years, with structured learning paths tailored to their age and skill level. We recommend at least two sessions (1 hour each) per week for the best learning experience.
faq.ce2_q: How is my child's data and privacy protected?
faq.ce2_a: We take data privacy extremely seriously, especially for children. All data is encrypted, we comply with COPPA guidelines, and we never share personal information with third parties. Parents have full control over their child's account and data.
faq.ce3_q: Can I get recordings of the classes for my child?
faq.ce3_a: Yes! All live sessions are recorded and available in your dashboard within 24 hours. Your child can re-watch lessons anytime to review concepts or catch up on missed classes.
faq.ce4_q: Is there any homework or outside practice required?
faq.ce4_a: We provide optional practice activities and mini-projects after each session to reinforce learning. These are designed to be fun and take about 15–30 minutes. They're recommended but not mandatory.
faq.ce5_a: Classes are conducted live online in small groups (4–8 students) or 1-on-1 with qualified instructors. We use interactive tools, screen sharing, and hands-on coding environments to keep students engaged throughout each session.
faq.ce6_q: What devices or software are needed for classes?
faq.ce6_a: A laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection is all you need. For programming courses, we use browser-based coding tools — no installation required. For robotics courses, we'll ship the required kit to your address.
faq.ce7_q: Does my child need prior experience in these courses?
faq.ce7_a: Not at all! Our courses are designed for all skill levels. Beginners start with the fundamentals, and we have advanced tracks for experienced students. Our smart recommendation system helps find the perfect starting point.
faq.ce8_q: Can I reschedule or cancel classes if needed?
faq.ce8_a: Absolutely. You can reschedule a class up to 4 hours before the session at no extra charge. We also offer flexible subscription plans that allow you to pause or adjust your schedule anytime.
faq.cs1_q: How do I contact customer support?
faq.cs1_a: You can reach us through our Contact Us page, email us at hello@procoder.com, or use the live chat available on our website. Our support team responds within 2–4 hours during business days.
faq.cs2_a: We offer a full refund within 7 days of enrollment if you're not satisfied. After the first week, we provide prorated refunds based on unused sessions. Your satisfaction is our priority.
faq.cs3_q: Do you offer free trial classes?
faq.cs3_a: Yes! We offer a completely free trial class with no obligation. Your child can experience a full session with one of our instructors to see if the program is a good fit before committing.
faq.cs4_q: Are there any discounts for siblings or long-term plans?
faq.cs4_a: Yes, we offer sibling discounts (15% off the second child), and our quarterly and annual plans come with significant savings. Contact our team for a personalized quote.
faq.cs5_q: How do I track my child's progress?
faq.cs5_a: Your parent dashboard provides real-time progress tracking, including completed lessons, quiz scores, projects built, and instructor feedback. You'll also receive weekly email summaries.
faq.tq1_q: Who are the instructors at ProCoder?
faq.tq1_a: Our instructors are certified educators and industry professionals with experience in teaching children. They go through a rigorous selection process, background checks, and ongoing training to ensure the highest quality teaching.
faq.tq2_a: We maintain a maximum ratio of 8:1 for group classes to ensure each student gets adequate attention. We also offer 1-on-1 sessions for students who prefer individual learning or need extra support.
faq.tq3_q: Can I request a specific teacher for my child?
faq.tq3_a: Yes, if your child connects well with a particular instructor, you can request them for future sessions. We do our best to accommodate teacher preferences to maintain learning continuity.
faq.tq4_q: How do teachers adapt to different learning styles?
faq.tq4_a: Our instructors are trained to identify and adapt to visual, auditory, and kinesthetic learning styles. They use varied teaching methods including demonstrations, interactive exercises, and project-based learning to engage every student.

parents.heroTitle: Your Child's Success Is Our Mission
parents.heroSubtitle: We treat every student like family. Real-time progress tracking, attendance alerts, instructor notes, and a dedicated parent dashboard — because you deserve full transparency.
parents.heroLogin: Already have an account? Log in
parents.trustSubtitle: We go beyond teaching — we partner with you to nurture your child's growth
parents.trust1Desc: Weekly detailed reports sent to your email with lesson scores, project completions, instructor feedback, and areas to improve.
parents.trust2Desc: Instant notifications if your child misses a class. We follow up personally and offer free makeup sessions — no lesson wasted.
parents.trust3Desc: After every session, the teacher leaves a personal note about your child's strengths, progress, and what to focus on next.
parents.trust4Desc: COPPA compliant platform. All instructors are background-checked. Classes are recorded so you can review anytime.
parents.trust5Desc: Reschedule up to 4 hours before class at no charge. Pause your subscription anytime. Your family's schedule comes first.
parents.trust6Desc: Message your child's instructor directly through the dashboard. Get answers about homework, progress, or any concerns.

parents.promiseSubtitle: Every child matters. Every minute counts.
parents.promise1: We value your child's time — structured lessons with zero filler
parents.promise2: We inform you about every absence within 1 hour
parents.promise3: We provide monthly progress summaries with actionable insights
parents.promise4: We celebrate achievements — badges, certificates, and shoutouts

courseData.scratch_desc: Learn the basics of programming through fun visual blocks. Create animations, games, and interactive stories while developing computational thinking skills.
courseData.python_desc: Dive into real programming with Python! Build games, automate tasks, and learn one of the world's most popular programming languages through exciting projects.
courseData.webdev_desc: Learn to build beautiful websites from scratch using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Create your own portfolio, blogs, and interactive web applications.
courseData.robot_basics_desc: Enter the exciting world of robotics! Build and program your own robots using simple kits. Learn about sensors, motors, and how robots interact with the world.
courseData.robot_adv_desc: Take your robotics skills to the next level. Design complex robots, work with advanced sensors, and learn autonomous navigation and AI concepts.
courseData.algo_intro_desc: Discover how computers think! Learn sorting, searching, and problem-solving strategies through puzzles, games, and visual challenges.
courseData.algo_comp_desc: Master advanced algorithms and data structures. Prepare for programming competitions like IOI and ICPC with real contest problems and strategies.
courseData.arabic_reading_desc: Build a strong foundation in Arabic through interactive lessons. Learn letters, words, and sentences with engaging activities and beautiful calligraphy.
courseData.arabic_grammar_desc: Deepen your Arabic skills with grammar and composition. Learn sentence structure, verb conjugation, and eloquent expression through stories and exercises.
courseData.quran_recitation_desc: Learn proper Quran recitation with Tajweed rules. Our qualified teachers guide students through beautiful recitation using interactive and engaging methods.
courseData.quran_memorization_desc: A structured program for Quran memorization (Hifz). Use proven techniques and supportive guidance to memorize and retain the Holy Quran.
courseData.gamedev_desc: Turn your game ideas into reality! Learn to design and build 2D games using popular game engines. Create characters, levels, and publish your own games.
